title: Smart Compact Living Prefab ADU Layout
summary: Maximize your space with the Smart Compact Living prefab ADU. Its minimal design brings in natural light, making it a great rental or cozy home for two.
marketingDescription: Smart Compact Living offers a **refined minimalist layout** with a focus on **natural light and space efficiency**. This prefabricated ADU features modern finishes and clean geometry, making it perfect for singles, couples, or as a rental unit. Experience the perfect balance of comfort and functionality in a beautifully designed space that **maximizes every square foot**.

title: The Family Smart Unit Modular Home Layout
summary: Build a cozy space for your growing family with the Family Smart Unit. This custom home saves energy, offers smart storage, and has large living areas.
marketingDescription: Designed with **growing families** in mind, the Family Smart Unit combines thoughtful space planning with modern amenities and **energy-efficient design**. **Open-plan living areas** create a sense of spaciousness, while **smart storage solutions** keep everything organized. This custom modular home is where memories are made, where life happens comfortably and efficiently.

title: Live & Work Hybrid Modular Home in California
summary: Enjoy working from home in our Live & Work Hybrid layout. It features a private office and cozy living areas to boost productivity and daily comfort.
marketingDescription: The ultimate solution for modern professionals in California who demand both **comfort and productivity**. The Live & Work Hybrid seamlessly integrates a **dedicated home office workspace** with residential living, featuring **acoustic considerations** and flexible layouts. Work from home without compromising on style or functionality in this custom-designed modular home.

title: Executive Comfort Modular Homes in California
summary: The Executive Comfort layout brings practical style to your life. Get a primary suite and an open floor plan made for relaxing or hosting your friends.
marketingDescription: Elevate your lifestyle with Executive Comfort, where **luxury meets practicality**. This custom modular home features premium finishes, spacious open-plan living, and a **primary suite with ensuite** that create an environment designed for both **relaxation and entertaining**. This is more than a home-it's a statement of refined living.

title: The Ultra Compact Retreat Prefab ADU | Fast Struct
summary: The Ultra Compact Retreat is an affordable prefab ADU. Use every inch of space wisely with this simple, minimal backyard living solution for your home.
marketingDescription: Embrace minimalist living without sacrificing comfort. The Ultra Compact Retreat proves that less truly is more, with **intelligent design that maximizes every inch**. This affordable prefabricated ADU is perfect for those seeking a **low-maintenance lifestyle** or a peaceful backyard retreat in California. Simple, elegant, and perfectly proportioned.

title: Spacious Grand Two-Bedroom Modular Home
summary: Need more room? Explore our Grand Two-Bedroom home design. This layout offers two full bathrooms, large open living areas, and an efficient design.
marketingDescription: The Grand Two-Bedroom delivers **full-size comfort** in a thoughtfully planned layout. Two bedrooms and **two full bathrooms** support everyday routines and guests alike, while open living areas and quality finishes keep the home bright and welcoming. It is an ideal choice when you want **serious square footage** without compromising on style or efficiency.
